description_long: This is a decorative, oval-shaped ceramic plant pot with a white interior and a blue-and-white exterior adorned with intricate floral and geometric patterns. The pot stands on three sculpted feet, each resembling an animal paw, and features ornate lion head motifs on its sides, which may serve as handles or simply as embellishments. The rim is slightly flared and smooth, providing a refined edge to the vessel. The blue floral designs are reminiscent of traditional Delftware or Chinese porcelain, giving the pot a classic, elegant appearance. The interior is plain white, contrasting with the detailed exterior. The overall craftsmanship suggests it is both ornamental and functional, suitable for displaying small to medium plants.
description: Ornate blue-and-white ceramic plant pot with floral patterns, lion head motifs, and three sculpted feet. Elegant and decorative, ideal for small to medium plants.
description_view_0: Front angle showing the lion head motif, three feet, and detailed blue floral patterns on the exterior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the oval shape, both lion head motifs, and the continuous blue-and-white decorative band.
description_view_2: Oblique angle similar to view 0, emphasizing the lion head and the curvature of the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the feet and decorative motifs.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative accent in garden courtyards or on elegant patios
attribute_decorative_pattern: blue floral and geometric motifs with sculpted lion heads
